title: 5006-TG ON-BEN Application for the 2026 Ontario Trillium Benefit and Ontario Senior Homeowners' Property Tax Grant - Canada.ca
content:
## 5006-TG ON-BEN Application for the 2026 Ontario Trillium Benefit and Ontario Senior Homeowners' Property Tax Grant
For best results, download and open this form in Adobe Reader . See General information for details.
You can view this form in:
- PDF fillable/saveable 5006-tg-fill-25e.pdf
For people with visual impairments, the following alternate formats are also available:
- E-text 5006-tg-25e.txt
- Large print 5006-tg-lp-25e.pdf
Last update: 2026-01-20
Previous-year versions are also available.

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
